title: Integrating Genetic Engineering Techniques &  Advanced Molecular Biology Approaches in DNA  Analysis, Recombination Technology, and PCR
author: Burhade, Durvesh
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: The experiments conducted encompass critical techniques and principles central to  genetic engineering and molecular biology. These include the isolation and analysis of  plasmid DNA and the estimation of DNA concentration through the diphenylamine  reaction. Advanced methodologies such as polymerase chain reaction (PCR) amplification,  and gel electrophoresis analysis were employed to ensure accurate detection,  quantification, and characterization of nucleic acids. Additionally, experiments on  recombinant DNA technology were conducted, integrating principles of restriction  enzyme digestion, ligation, and transformation to elucidate the mechanisms of genetic  recombination. The studies culminated in a comprehension understanding of molecular  techniques pivotal for advancements in biotechnology.

keywords: Genetic Engineering, Molecular Biology, Plasmid DNA, Recombination  DNA Technology, Polymerase Chain Reaction (PCR), Gel Electrophoresis.
